queries.filter((query) => matchQuery(filters, query)) : queries; } notify(event) { notifyManager.batch(() => { this.listeners.forEach((listener) => { listener(event); }); }); } onFocus() { notifyManager.batch(() => { this.getAll().forEach((query) => { query.onFocus(); }); }); } onOnline() { notifyManager.batch(() => { this.getAll().forEach((query) => { query.onOnline(); }); }); } }; _queries = new WeakMap(); export { QueryCache }; //# sourceMappingURL=queryCache.js.map
